title: India: 2025 analysis of payments and ecommerce trends
snippet:
## India’s cash-resilient, digitally rising environment

India continues to see rapid growth in digital payments, with over 130 billion transactions expected by the end of 2025. According to Worldline, the country’s instant payment system, UPI (Unified Payments Interface), accounted for over 75% of payment transaction volumes in 2024, processing over 13 billion transactions monthly. In value terms, digital payments exceeded INR 130.19 trillion (U
